allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/about" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 12; "about -> $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "value-card class: $\($r.Content -match 'nt-value-card'\)"; "value-icon class: $\($r.Content -match 'nt-value-icon'\)"; "old dot removed \(Ellipse should be False\): $\($r.Content -match 'data-name=\\"Ellipse\\"'\)" } catch { "about -> ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
